tests.name: PHQ-9: All zeros → Minimal
tests.expected_result: Score: 0, severity: Minimal, color: clinical-safe

tests.name: PHQ-9: All max (27) → Severe
tests.expected_result: Score: 27, severity: Severe, color: clinical-emergency

tests.name: PHQ-9: Missing Q5 → INSUFFICIENT_DATA
steps: Submit PHQ-9 with 8 of 9 responses (Q5 missing)
tests.expected_result: insufficientData: true, score: null, message: 'All questions required'
invariant_coverage: ELENA: INSUFFICIENT_DATA for missing values, not scored as 0

tests.name: PHQ-9: Q9 ≥ 1 triggers suicidal ideation alert
preconditions: Scoring engine + clinical decision rules loaded
steps: Submit PHQ-9 with Q9 = 1, other questions = 0
tests.expected_result: Score: 1, severity: Minimal, BUT triggeredRules includes MH-002 (suicidal ideation alert)
invariant_coverage: ELENA: clinical safety — Q9 always triggers MH-002 regardless of total score

tests.name: PHQ-9: Boundary 9→10 (mild→moderate)
tests.expected_result: 9: severity=Mild, 10: severity=Moderate

tests.name: GAD-7: All zeros → Minimal
tests.expected_result: Score: 0, severity: Minimal

tests.name: GAD-7: All max (21) → Severe
tests.expected_result: Score: 21, severity: Severe

tests.name: GAD-7: Missing responses → INSUFFICIENT_DATA
tests.expected_result: insufficientData: true

tests.name: FINDRISC: All lowest → Low risk
steps: Submit: age <45(0), BMI <25(0), waist M<94(0), active(0), veg daily(0), no BP meds(0), no high glucose(0), no family DM(0)
tests.expected_result: Score: 0, severity: Low, riskPercent: ~1%

tests.name: FINDRISC: Max score → Very high risk
steps: Submit: age >64(4), BMI >30(3), waist max(4), no activity(2), no daily veg(1), BP meds(2), high glucose(5), parent DM(5)
tests.expected_result: Score: 26, severity: Very high, riskPercent: ~50%
invariant_coverage: ELENA: weighted scoring — note different weights per question

tests.name: FINDRISC: Score 15 triggers DM-001 screening rule
preconditions: Scoring engine + clinical decision rules loaded
tests.expected_result: triggeredRules includes DM-001, recommendation includes 'proceed directly to OGTT'

tests.name: SCORE2: Low-risk region, young, all favorable → Low
steps: Submit: age 42, female, non-smoker, SBP 120, TC 5.0, HDL 1.5, region: low (Brazil)
tests.expected_result: Risk < 2.5%, classification: Low risk

tests.name: SCORE2: High risk triggers CVD-001
steps: Submit: age 60, male, smoker, SBP 170, TC 7.0, HDL 0.9, region: low
tests.expected_result: Risk ≥ 7.5%, triggeredRules includes CVD-001, recommendation includes statin

tests.name: Framingham: Male, low risk profile
steps: Submit: age 45, male, TC 200, HDL 50, SBP 120, not treated, non-smoker, no diabetes
tests.expected_result: 10-year risk < 10%, classification: Low/Borderline

tests.name: Framingham: Female high risk
steps: Submit: age 65, female, TC 280, HDL 35, SBP 160, treated, smoker, diabetes
tests.expected_result: 10-year risk > 20%, classification: High risk

tests.name: Framingham: Age out of range (29) → reject
tests.expected_result: Error: age must be 30-79 for Framingham

tests.name: Billing code cross-reference: TUSS → CBHPM → ICD-10
steps: Look up TUSS 10101012 → verify returns CBHPM 1.01.01.01-2 and valid ICD-10 codes
tests.expected_result: Mapping found: 'Consulta em consultório', CPT 99213, SNOMED 185349003
invariant_coverage: RUTH: billing codes must correspond to documented clinical services

tests.name: Billing code: invalid TUSS → graceful error
tests.expected_result: Null/not found, not a crash

tests.name: CDS rule: BP 180/120 triggers HTN-002 (crisis)
tests.expected_result: Triggered: HTN-002 (hypertensive crisis), urgency: emergent

tests.name: CDS rule: HbA1c 8.5 triggers DM-002
tests.expected_result: Triggered: DM-002 (intensify treatment), urgency: urgent

tests.name: Twilio webhook: valid signature → processed
steps: Send POST to /api/comms/webhook/twilio with valid X-Twilio-Signature, Body='Hello', From='whatsapp:+5511987654321'
tests.expected_result: 200 OK, message stored in DB, conversation created/updated

tests.name: Twilio webhook: invalid signature → 403
steps: Send POST to /api/comms/webhook/twilio with invalid X-Twilio-Signature
tests.expected_result: 403 Forbidden, message NOT stored, audit log entry: 'INVALID_WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE'
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: VETO-level — anyone can spoof without this

tests.name: Twilio webhook: replay attack (same MessageSid) → rejected
steps: Resend exact same webhook payload with same MessageSid
tests.expected_result: 200 OK but message NOT duplicated (idempotency on MessageSid)

tests.name: Send WhatsApp: patient without consent → rejected
tests.expected_result: success: false, failureReason: 'Patient has not granted WhatsApp consent'

tests.name: Send message with PHI in body → rejected
steps: POST /api/comms/send with content containing 'diagnóstico: hipertensão' or 'resultado: glicose 250'
tests.expected_result: 400 Bad Request, error: 'Message content must not contain clinical data. Use portal links.'
invariant_coverage: RUTH: message body MUST NOT contain PHI

tests.name: Create invoice → audit log entry created
tests.expected_result: Invoice created, AuditLog entry with action=INVOICE_CREATED, entityType=Invoice, dataHash computed

tests.name: Void invoice → refund + audit trail
preconditions: Invoice exists with status=PAID, Stripe connected
tests.expected_result: Invoice status=VOID, Stripe refund initiated, AuditLog entry with action=INVOICE_VOIDED
invariant_coverage: RUTH: void must retain audit trail

tests.name: Submit PHQ-9 → FHIR QuestionnaireResponse created
tests.expected_result: Score returned + fhirQuestionnaireResponseId populated, QuestionnaireResponse persisted
invariant_coverage: RUTH: FHIR resource created for every screening

tests.name: Gov submit (RNDS sandbox) → stub OK
tests.expected_result: status: STUB_OK, note: 'Stub implementation — production pending'

tests.name: Hash chain integrity verification
tests.expected_result: integrityStatus.verified: true, totalLinks matches AuditLog count, brokenAt: null

tests.name: 3-panel layout: no page scroll at 1080p
tests.expected_result: document.body.scrollHeight === document.body.clientHeight. Each panel scrolls independently.

tests.name: 3-panel layout: responsive collapse at mobile
tests.expected_result: Left and right panels hidden. Center panel takes full width. Tab navigation for other panels.

tests.name: Model selector dropdown shows all 13 models
tests.expected_result: 13 models shown, grouped by Frontier/Economy/Specialized. Current selection highlighted.

tests.name: CDSS quick action fires real API
tests.expected_result: Loading spinner, then real response from /api/cdss/chat (not simulateLLMResponse mock). Response includes sourceAuthority.

tests.name: Full WhatsApp conversation flow
preconditions: Comunicações page loaded, demo conversations exist
tests.expected_result: Message appears with 'Sending...' → 'Sent' → 'Delivered' status progression.

tests.name: Analytics dashboard shows real data
tests.expected_result: Revenue KPIs populated, trend chart renders, payer mix shows distribution

tests.name: Complete PHQ-9 screening end-to-end
tests.expected_result: Score displayed with severity badge (color + icon + text). Recommendation shown. If Q9 ≥ 1, suicidal ideation alert is prominent.

tests.name: First-run onboarding flow completes
tests.expected_result: Tour completes, firstRunCompleted set to true, subsequent logins skip onboarding

tests.name: settings/route.ts requires auth
tests.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

tests.name: pre-auth/send requires auth
tests.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

tests.name: billing/invoice requires BILLING role
tests.expected_result: 403 Forbidden (wrong role)

tests.name: billing/void requires ORG_ADMIN for amounts > R$500
preconditions: Invoice amount R$800, authenticated as BILLING (not ORG_ADMIN)
tests.expected_result: 403 Forbidden, message: 'ORG_ADMIN approval required for voids > R$500'

tests.name: Cross-tenant conversation access denied
preconditions: User in org A, conversation belongs to org B
tests.expected_result: 404 Not Found (not 403, to avoid information leakage)

tests.name: Cross-tenant patient access denied
preconditions: User in org A, patient belongs to org B
tests.expected_result: 404 Not Found

tests.name: PHI endpoint without X-Access-Reason → 403
tests.expected_result: 403 Forbidden, message: 'X-Access-Reason header required for PHI access'

tests.name: PHI endpoint with invalid X-Access-Reason → 403
tests.expected_result: 403 Forbidden, only TREATMENT/OPERATIONS/PAYMENT/LEGAL/PUBLIC_HEALTH accepted

tests.name: CPF encrypted in database
steps: Query raw DB: SELECT cpf FROM Patient WHERE id = :id
tests.expected_result: CPF field is encrypted (not plaintext). Decrypted only through encryptPHIWithVersion.
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: PII fields encrypted with encryptPHIWithVersion

tests.name: Conversation message content encrypted at rest
steps: Query raw DB: SELECT content FROM Message WHERE id = :id
tests.expected_result: Content is encrypted. Readable only through application layer.
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: patient communications encrypted at rest

tests.name: Audit log deletion attempt → blocked
steps: Attempt DELETE /api/billing/audit or direct DB delete on AuditLog
tests.expected_result: Operation blocked. AuditLog records are immutable per LGPD Art. 37.
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: VETO — deletion of AuditLog is prohibited

tests.name: Audit log hash chain tamper detection
preconditions: Multiple audit entries with hash chain
steps: Manually modify one AuditLog.dataHash in DB
tests.expected_result: integrityStatus.verified: false, brokenAt: [modified entry ID]

tests.name: Transcript de-identified before LLM call
preconditions: CDSS suggestion request with patient name 'João Carlos da Silva' in transcript
tests.expected_result: Patient name replaced with [PATIENT] or removed. CPF, CNS never sent to external LLM.
